company_description: SOTI is an enterprise mobility management (EMM) software company offering the SOTI ONE Platform — an integrated suite of products for managing, securing, and optimizing business-critical mobile devices, rugged hardware, printers, and IoT endpoints across industries such as retail, healthcare, transportation, and field services.

products.name: SOTI ONE Platform
products.description: An integrated enterprise mobility management suite that provides unified control, visibility, and optimization across all business-critical mobile devices, printers, and IoT endpoints.

products.name: SOTI MobiControl
products.description: A comprehensive MDM/EMM solution for enrolling, configuring, securing, and remotely managing smartphones, tablets, rugged devices, and computers across Android, iOS, Windows, and Linux.

products.name: SOTI XSight
products.description: An advanced analytics and diagnostics tool that provides real-time visibility and AI-driven insights into mobile device performance, health, and operational trends — LEARN AI.

products.name: SOTI Connect
products.description: An IoT device management solution that enables organizations to remotely manage, monitor, and update industrial printers, scanners, and other connected peripherals at scale.

products.name: SOTI Snap
products.description: A low-code mobile application development platform that enables businesses to rapidly build, deploy, and manage enterprise mobile apps without extensive coding.

products.name: SOTI Identity
products.description: A centralized identity and access management solution that provides single sign-on (SSO) and authentication services across the SOTI ONE Platform and connected enterprise applications.

products.name: SOTI Pulse
products.description: A community and support hub that connects SOTI customers, partners, and administrators for peer discussion, case logging, and marketplace access.

products.name: SOTI Stella
products.description: An AI-powered assistant embedded in the SOTI ONE Platform that provides intelligent recommendations and automation for enterprise mobility operations — LEARN AI.

products.name: SOTI Aerospace
products.description: A specialized mobility management venture targeting aerospace industry use cases, extending SOTI's EMM capabilities to aviation and aerospace operational environments.

products.name: SOTI University
products.description: SOTI's official learning management system offering on-demand, self-paced courses and certifications for mobility professionals working with SOTI products.

competitive_products.competitive_context: Workspace ONE is a leading unified endpoint management (UEM) platform that competes directly with SOTI MobiControl for enterprise mobile and desktop device management.
Microsoft Intune is a cloud-based MDM/MAM solution integrated with Microsoft 365 that competes with SOTI MobiControl for Windows and cross-platform device management.
Jamf Pro is a leading Apple device management platform that competes with SOTI MobiControl for iOS and macOS enterprise device management.
Ivanti Neurons for MDM is a cloud-based unified endpoint management solution that competes with SOTI MobiControl across Android, iOS, and Windows device fleets.
Honeywell's device analytics platform competes with SOTI XSight for operational visibility into rugged mobile device fleets in industrial and logistics environments.
SureMDM is a unified endpoint management solution targeting rugged and enterprise mobile devices, competing with SOTI MobiControl especially in field services and retail.

partnership_signals.channel_program: SOTI Altitude Program (Reseller, MSP, Distributor, OEM, Platform, Technology Partner tracks)
partnership_signals.ilt_vilt: SOTI University offers on-demand self-paced courses; instructor-led options not confirmed from available data

SOTI ONE Platform — Connecting Everything Your business-critical mobile operations have never been bigger or more important. With more devices, operating systems (OS) and remote workers, everything must be fast, secure and reliable. The SOTI ONE Platform is an innovative, integrated management solution that maximizes the ROI of your business-critical mobile devices and printers. It reduces the cost, complexity and downtime of your mobile operations and delivers actionable insights to help you make data-driven decisions. Workers are more efficient because devices are more reliable and packed with the tools, data and apps needed to get the job done - fast. Manage your essential mobile devices and printers for total control while increasing the effectiveness of your mobile operations with the SOTI ONE Platform. Click here to learn how your business can experience the SOTI ONE Platform. Mobility Management SOTI MobiControl makes Enter
